issue: Difficulty: ❌ TRIVIAL - Requires at least MEDIUM

Updated tools/reference.py and gen_report.py Appendix C prose, regenerated seed.sql, evidence.gif, expected correlation/findings JSON, solution AuditCorrelator.java, M2 tests and instruction, task.toml difficulty to hard, Dockerfile platform-revision r27, rubrics and submission explanations; committed and resubmitted without send-to-reviewer.
